summary: Tested Demucs AI vocal removal bug fix. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). POST /api/projects/{project_id}/extract-background returns 200 with WAV audio. Demucs Python API successfully removes human voice and keeps background music. Frontend: Extract Background Audio button visible in Editor sidebar, clicking it shows 'Removing voice...' loading state, then 'Download Background Music' button appears with success toast.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Demucs AI vocal removal feature tested and working. The extract_background_audio() function in server.py (line 321) uses Demucs Python API with soundfile instead of CLI. Backend logs confirm 'Demucs vocal separation successful!' messages. Frontend has two Extract Background Audio buttons: one standalone (data-testid='extract-bg-btn-standalone') when no audio generated, and one in download section (data-testid='extract-bg-btn') when audio exists. Test session token can be obtained dynamically via login.

demucs_fix_verification.old_approach: CLI-based Demucs (failed due to torchaudio CUDA dependency)
demucs_fix_verification.new_approach: Python API with get_model + apply_model + soundfile
demucs_fix_verification.backend_logs_confirm: Multiple 'Demucs vocal separation successful!' messages in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log
demucs_fix_verification.audio_output: 240KB WAV file with RIFF header, mono 24000Hz
